data.title: Market News: Trump instructs the presidential working group to advance strategic reserves of cryptocurrencies including XRP, SOL and ADA
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, Trump said that his digital asset executive order instructs the presidential working group to promote strategic reserves of cryptocurrencies including XRP, SOL and ADA. Trump also said that he would ensure that the United States becomes the world's cryptocurrency capital and is making America great again.

data.title: Greeks.Live: Most traders are watching to see if $82,000 can hold support on Bitcoin's weekly chart
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.Live macro researcher Adam published an English community briefing on the X platform, saying that after Bitcoin plummeted from $85,000-96,000 to $78,000 in a short period of time and caused heavy losses, group members generally took a bearish attitude. Most traders are watching whether $82,000 on the weekly chart can support, and many believe that a further drop to the $72,000 area is possible. The recent price action has been described as "crazy" and "violent", and traders have lost most of their portfolios, with some even suffering a 70% loss. Many traders are considering rolling over positions and selling some call options in an effort to recover, while maintaining a slightly positive delta exposure to cope with possible upward movements. The general consensus is that consolidation and building a base in the coming week will be a positive sign, and if momentum recovers, some people expect a possible return to the mean reversion to the $86,000-89,000 range.

data.title: 50x leverage long users currently have over 72,000 ETH positions, and ETH will be liquidated if it drops by $43
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to monitoring by on-chain analyst Ai Yi, a user with 50x leverage on Hyperliquid closed his long position of 469.48 BTC and instead increased his long position on ETH. Currently, his ETH position has exceeded 72,000, about 159 million US dollars, and his position will be liquidated if the ETH price drops by 43 US dollars.

data.title: 50x leverage long BTC and ETH users increased their positions again, with a total position of $220 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, users who previously used 50x leverage to go long on BTC and ETH on the Hyperliquid platform have added 914 ETH and 41 BTC.
Currently, the user's holdings have been updated to:
ETH 50,298 (liquidation price $2,136.98);
BTC 1,301 (liquidation price $84,626).

data.title: Users who have long BTC and ETH with 50x leverage on Hyperliquid are close to the liquidation price, with a floating loss of $507,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, users who have long BTC and ETH with 50x leverage on Hyperliquid are close to liquidation, and currently have a floating loss of $507,000. Previously, the user used 6 million USDC as principal to open a long position of more than $200 million, which are: ETH: 49,384, opening price $2,196, liquidation price $2,133.9; BTC: 1,260, opening price $85,671, liquidation price $84,629.

data.title: El Salvador’s President meets with a16z co-founders to discuss AI landscape in post-DeepSeek environment
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the Salvadoran Bitcoin Office, the country's President Bukele recently met with a16z co-founder Marc Andreessen and benahorowitz.eth. The topics discussed included: investment opportunities in El Salvador as an emerging regional technology center focused on free technology, the AI ​​landscape in a post-DeepSeek environment, and open source and proprietary models in AI.

data.title: El Salvador Explores Tech Investment Opportunities With A16z Founders
data.description: According to Odaily, El Salvador's President Nayib Bukele recently met with Marc Andreessen and Ben Horowitz, co-founders of the venture capital firm a16z. The discussions focused on investment opportunities in El Salvador as an emerging tech hub dedicated to free technology. They also explored the landscape of artificial intelligence in a post-DeepSeek environment, including the roles of open-source and proprietary models in AI development.

data.title: Ethereum Falls Below $2200 Amid Narrowing Gains
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ethereum's price has dropped below $2200, currently trading at $2183. The 24-hour gain has narrowed to 1.17%.
